title: AI-SDLC Review Attestation v1
description: DSSE envelope (https://github.com/secure-systems-lab/dsse) carrying a v1 review-attestation predicate. Schema for /ai-sdlc execute Step 10 outputs at .ai-sdlc/attestations/<commit-sha>.dsse.json — verified by .github/workflows/verify-attestation.yml.

payloadType.description: Vendor URI for the AI-SDLC review-attestation predicate. Bound by DSSE PAE so a signature for one payloadType can never be replayed onto another.

payload.description: Base64-encoded JSON of the predicate. Decoded predicate must conform to the `predicate` definition in this schema.

keyid.description: Identifier of the public key that produced this signature. Free-form, typically <identity>:<machine>.

sig.description: Base64-encoded raw ed25519 signature (64 bytes → 88 b64 chars).

schemaVersion.description: MANDATORY. Allowlist enforced by CI — currently only 'v1' is accepted.

sha1.description: Git commit SHA-1 (40 lowercase hex chars).

diffHash.description: sha256 of `git diff origin/main...HEAD` at attestation time. Mismatch = PR diff changed since signing.

policyHash.description: sha256 of `.ai-sdlc/review-policy.md` at attestation time. Mismatch = policy edited since signing.

agentId.description: Matches the `name` field of the reviewer agent .md file (e.g. 'code-reviewer').

agentFileHash.description: sha256 of the reviewer agent's .md file at attestation time. Mismatch = agent file changed since signing.

findings.description: Counts only — full verdict JSON lives in PR body for human review.

pluginVersion.description: Version of ai-sdlc-plugin/plugin.json at attestation time.

iterationCount.description: Number of dev rounds (re-implementation passes) the work went through. ONE attestation per RUN — earlier iterations are not separately attested.

harnessNote.description: Empty string when reviewer-independence was enforced; warning string when fallback occurred (e.g. '⚠ INDEPENDENCE NOT ENFORCED (codex unavailable, fell back to claude-code)').
